name: First Molt
description: Your Mote completed its first molt and took its true form.

name: Rookie Steps
description: Evolved into a Rookie stage for the first time.

name: True Form Emerging
description: Evolved into the Evolved stage for the first time.

name: Prime Ascension
description: Evolved into the Prime stage for the first time.

name: Apex Achieved
description: Evolved into the Apex stage — the pinnacle of your lineage.

name: Showing Promise
description: Your pet's grade reached B for the first time.

name: Exceptional Quality
description: Your pet's grade reached A — a rare achievement.

name: Legendary Grade
description: Your pet achieved S grade — truly extraordinary.

name: The Long Haul
description: Earned the Marathoner trait for the first time.

name: Burst and Rest
description: Earned the Sprinter trait for the first time.

name: Many Tongues
description: Earned the Polyglot trait for the first time.

name: Child of Midnight
description: Earned the Nightshade trait for the first time.

name: Early Riser
description: Earned the Daybreaker trait for the first time.

name: Model Curious
description: Earned the Switcher trait for the first time.

name: Depth of Focus
description: Earned the Deepdiver trait for the first time.

name: Many Are One
description: Earned the Swarm trait for the first time.

name: Bridge Builder
description: Earned the Polyhost trait for the first time.

name: Watcher of the Night
description: Locked the Vigil pattern — Marathoner and Nightshade combined.

name: Eye of the Storm
description: Locked the Tempest pattern — Sprinter and Swarm combined.

name: Spectrum Complete
description: Locked the Prism pattern — four distinct traits in one pet.

name: Between Worlds
description: Locked the Chimera pattern — Polyhost and Switcher combined.

name: Second Generation
description: Raised your second generation of pets through rebirth.

name: Lineage Begins
description: Reached the fifth generation — your lineage has real depth.

name: Ancient Line
description: Ten generations of rebirth — your lineage is truly ancient.

name: Through the Cocoon
description: Survived a week of dormancy — your pet endured the silence and emerged.

name: Seasoned Molter
description: Accumulated 10 molts across all lifetimes.

name: Master of Change
description: Accumulated 50 molts across all lifetimes — a dedication to growth.

name: Quarter Collection
description: Filled 25% of the Dex — you have seen much, but there is more.

name: Halfway There
description: Filled 50% of the Dex — the collection is taking real shape.

name: Kaleidoscope
description: Earned 5 distinct traits in a single lifetime — a truly diverse pet.

name: Aether Mastery
description: Reached the Apex stage with a full Aether lineage.

name: Cipher Mastery
description: Reached the Apex stage with a full Cipher lineage.

name: Flux Mastery
description: Reached the Apex stage with a full Flux lineage.

name: Forge Mastery
description: Reached the Apex stage with a full Forge lineage.

name: Shore Leave
description: Earned a vacation spot — the Beach Cove is yours.

name: Into the Green
description: Your pet has earned a quiet glade to wander.

name: Summit Reached
description: Your lineage has grown strong enough for the high peaks.

name: Into the Dusk
description: Endured five generations — the desert dunes beckon.

name: Red Horizon
description: Reached Grade A — your pet has earned an alien sky.

name: Ice Moon
description: Filled 10% of the Dex — Europa's frozen plains await.

name: Moonwalker
description: Your lineage spans 7 generations — a lunar base is constructed.

name: Between the Stars
description: Filled 25% of the Dex — the nebula opens its drifting corridors.

name: Warp Speed
description: Ten generations of rebirth — you command the observation deck.
